title: Sale and Engineering Support Engineer [Lentor | 5 days | up to $3450] - LCYL
description:
Sale and Engineering Support Engineer

  • Location: Nearest MRT Lentor Singapore 787542 [ Report to office but might need to travel to site]
  • Working hours: Monday – Friday | 8.30am – 6.15pm
  • Salary: Max $3450

Job Descriptions:

  • Technical Support: Serve as a primary technical point of contact for customers, providing expert guidance and troubleshooting. You'll also provide feedback to help with follow-up jobs.
  • Pre-Sales Engineering: Work with the Sales Manager to understand customer requirements and provide technical information on our products. You will also assist in preparing direct estimates and quotations and participate in the planning and survey phase of new installations.
  • Project Execution: Coordinate with the Project Manager to assist in the procurement of parts and components. You will also convert design drawings into working drawings, carry out tests and prepare reports for system commissioning, and ensure work is completed according to as-built drawings.
  • Team Leadership: Lead a team of technicians and assistants, delegating work and monitoring their progress to meet deadlines.
  • Client Relations: Build rapport with clients by showing you care about their concerns. You will be their key contact for technical advice and support.

Qualifications & Requirements:

  • Diploma / Degree in Engineering (Mechanical, Electrical, or Controls).
  • A proven track record in a technical support or sales engineering role is preferred
  • Reports directly to the Sales Manager and Project Manager.


Cheong Yeat Long | R25145358

The Supreme HR Advisory Pte Ltd | EA 14C7279

THE SUPREME HR ADVISORY PTE. LTD.

Here at The Supreme HR Advisory, we pride ourselves on being a vibrant recruitment firm with strong Southeast Asia standing. We believe in customizing our services to cater to your unique needs. We are dedicated, enthusiastic and we take innovative approaches in customizing our services. Our depth of experience enables us to understand each industry’s challenges and provide expert advice on hiring requirements. Our goal is to leverage local knowledge and global expertise to deliver high-quality candidates specifically matched to the requirements of each of our clients worldwide.
